archetype: The Performance Pro / Swiss Brutalist (Industrial Variant)

typography.installation: Ensure fonts are imported from Google Fonts.

rules: Use high contrast. Workshop environments require maximum legibility.
Avoid subtle gradients. Use solid colors with distinct borders.
Never use pure black #000000. Zinc-950 gives a sophisticated industrial feel.

layouts.general: Responsive sidebar layout for Admin/Capo. Full-screen dedicated layout for Scan Station (Dipendenti).
layouts.admin_dashboard: Bento grid for metrics, full-width data tables for orders.
layouts.scan_station: Massive centered UI. Huge buttons, prominent status indicators. Designed for touchscreens and quick visual confirmation from a distance.
layouts.spacing: Use p-6 to p-8 for admin panels. Use p-12 to p-16 for Scan Station elements.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Massive scale (h-20, text-2xl) for Scan Station Start/Stop actions.
components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-zinc-900), 1px border (border-zinc-800). No soft shadows, use crisp borders.
components.inputs: High contrast inputs. bg-zinc-950, distinct borders. Large text for easy reading.
components.tables: Dense rows but highly legible. Clear hover states (hover:bg-zinc-800/50).
components.badges: Use for status. Bright, solid colors, uppercase text, bold.

icons.usage: Use thick, readable icons (strokeWidth={2.5}). Large sizes for the Scan Station.

login_background.description: Modern factory floor, suitable for an industrial login screen background with a dark overlay.

visual_enhancers.scan_station: Use a subtle pulsing animation on the 'In Progress' state. Use green flashes for successful barcode scans, red flashes for errors.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) for the admin dashboard. Expose the skeleton.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust sidebar navigation for the 'Capo' role (Dashboard, Ordini, Report).
Build a dedicated, full-screen route for the 'Scan Station' (Dipendenti). This screen must be highly visible from afar, with huge fonts and buttons.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard elements (Tables, Dialogs, Forms) but heavily customize the Scan Station to use native massive Tailwind classes.
Use Recharts for the Dashboard (Ore lavorate, Pezzi prodotti). Ensure charts use the dark theme colors (zinc, blue, amber, emerald).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
The application language is Italian (Ordini di Produzione, Schede di Lavorazione, Inizia, Ferma, ecc.).
Mock the barcode scanning by providing an input field that auto-submits on 'Enter' (typical barcode scanner behavior).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not center align standard text unless specifically in the Scan Station hero area.
Ensure glassmorphism or overlays are fully readable (use bg-zinc-900/90 with backdrop-blur).
Apply precise hover/focus states to all buttons, ensuring contrast increases.
Toast notifications (sonner) should be used for successful scans or errors in the Scan Station.
Use 2x normal spacing. Industrial interfaces need to prevent accidental misclicks.
